userMessage: how can I give u screenshots?

response.text:
Upload the screenshot directly as an image attachment in the chat, ideally PNG or JPG.

If you’re using TekAutomate, you can also save it first with a screenshot step, then attach the saved file here. Example flow step:
- save_screenshot

If you want me to help analyze it, also tell me what I should look for on the screen, since I may not be able to read the image pixels directly in this mode.
